title: Day 1: Day 1: Why Recruiting Matters
content:
# Day 1: Why Recruiting Matters

## Topic
The Foundation: Why Recruiting is Your Most Important Skill

## Key Points
1. **The Math** — One productive agent typically closes 8-12 transactions per year. At ~$500K per transaction, that's $4-6M in volume. After splits, your net profit? ~$16K per agent annually.

2. **Brokerage Growth Equation** — Growth = Agent Count × Agent Productivity. You can only push productivity so far. Adding agents has compound effects.

3. **Leverage Multiplier** — Recruiting is the only activity that multiplies your results without multiplying your personal time. One great recruiter can build an entire organization.

## Why It Matters
If you want to build a thriving brokerage, you cannot out-recruit your competition on service, marketing, or technology alone. You need agents. And the best brokers make recruiting their #1 priority because they know: **no agents = no business.**

---

*Tomorrow: Day 2 — The Recruiting Mindset*
